tweets.text:
3 things that will kill ur ecom brand before ur ads do:

> Churn rate above 55%
> LTV:CAC below 2:1
> Counterfeit listings ur too busy to deal with

Fix these before u touch ur creative budget.

Hot take: ur Meta ads are making ur counterfeiters rich.

Every dollar u spend building brand awareness is a free lead for the guy in Shenzhen who's copying ur  product, undercutting the price 40%, and running ads to ur OWN AUDIENCE.

Ur doing their R&D. Doing the market

If ur brand is on Amazon and u think ur safe because ur product is "too niche to fake"

They're faking toilet paper on Amazon Fresh.

Think about that.

tweets.text: Using Wispr Flow when working in Claude Code is a productivity superpower. It is difficult at first to overcome the strangeness of the behavioral change because we are all so used to typing, but so worth it!

One of our businesses sells political and patriotic products and has done 936,632 orders on Shopify, but sadly

If you care more about your marketing team creating on brand assets over making you money you’re an idiot. 

I can’t tell you how many SMBs we speak with who are perfectionists when it comes to their creative, landers, etc. 

Then they wonder why their ads aren’t performing.
